title: Dark Foreboding
description: A faint breeze blows past the psyker and those near him, and everyone gets the feeling that somewhere in the galaxy something unfortunate just happened.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Warp Echo
description: For a few moments, all noises cause echoes, regardless of the surroundings.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Unholy Stench
description: The air around the psyker becomes permeated with a bizarre and foul smell.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Mind Warp
description: The psyker suffers a –5 penalty to Willpower tests until the start of his next turn as his own inherent phobias, suspicions, and hatreds surge to the surface of his mind in a wave of unbound emotion.
effect: Psyker –5 WP tests until start of next turn.

title: Hoarfrost
description: The temperature plummets for an instant, and a thin coating of frost forms to cover everything within 3d10 metres.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Aura of Taint
description: All animals within 1d100 metres become spooked and agitated; characters can use the Psyniscience skill to pinpoint the psyker as the cause.
effect: No mechanical effect on PCs.

title: Memory Worm
description: All people within line of sight of the psyker forget some trivial fact or minor personal memory.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Spoilage
description: Food and drink go bad in a 5d10 metre radius.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Haunting Breeze
description: Winds whip up around the psyker for a few moments, blowing light objects around and guttering fires within 3d10 metres.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Veil of Darkness
description: For a brief moment (until the end of the round), the area within 3d10 metres is plunged into immediate and impenetrable darkness.
effect: Darkness within 3d10m until end of round.

title: Distorted Reflections
description: Mirrors and other reflective surfaces within a radius of 5d10 metres distort or shatter.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: Breath Leech
description: Each character (including the psyker) within a 3d10 metre radius becomes short of breath for one round and cannot make any Run or Charge actions.
effect: No Run or Charge within 3d10m for 1 round.

title: Daemonic Mask
description: For a fleeting moment, the psyker takes on a daemonic appearance and gains the Fear (1) trait until the start of the next turn. However, he also gains 1 Corruption point.
effect: Psyker gains Fear (1) until next turn, +1 Corruption.

title: Unnatural Decay
description: All plant life within 3d10 metres of the psyker withers and dies.
effect: No mechanical effect on PCs.

title: Spectral Gale
description: Howling winds erupt around the psyker, requiring each character (including the psyker) within 4d10 metres to make an Easy (+30) Agility or Strength test to avoid being knocked Prone.
effect: Easy (+30) Ag or S test or Prone within 4d10m.

title: Bloody Tears
description: Blood weeps from stone and wood within 3d10 metres of the psyker. If there are any paintings, pict-displays, statues, or other representations of people inside this area, they appear to be crying blood.
effect: No mechanical effect.

title: The Earth Protests
description: The ground suddenly shakes, and each character (including the psyker) within a 5d10 metre radius must make an Ordinary (+10) Agility test or be knocked down.
effect: Ordinary (+10) Ag test or Prone within 5d10m.

title: Actinic Discharge
description: Static electricity fills the air within 5d10 metres causing hair to stand on end and unprotected electronics to short out, while the psyker is wreathed in eldritch lightning.
effect: Electronics within 5d10m may short out (GM discretion).

title: Warp Ghosts
description: Ghostly apparitions fill the air within 3d10 metres around the psyker, flying about and howling in pain for a few brief moments. Each character in the radius (except the psyker himself) must test against Fear (1).
effect: Fear (1) test for all within 3d10m (not psyker).

title: Falling Upwards
description: Everything within 2d10 metres of the psyker (including the psyker himself) rises 1d10 metres into the air as gravity briefly ceases. Almost immediately, everything crashes back to earth, suffering falling damage as appropriate for the distances fallen.
effect: All within 2d10m rise 1d10m then fall (falling damage).

title: Banshee Howl
description: A shrill keening rings out across the immediate area, shattering glass and forcing each living creature able to hear it (including the psyker) to pass a Challenging (+0) Toughness test or be deafened for 1d10 rounds.
effect: Challenging (+0) T test or Deafened 1d10 rounds.

title: The Furies
description: The psyker is assailed by unseen horrors. He is slammed to the ground and suffers 1d5 Impact damage (ignoring Armour, but not Toughness bonus) and he must test against Fear (2).
effect: Psyker: 1d5 Impact (ignore AP), Prone, Fear (2).

title: Shadow of the Warp
description: For a split second, the world changes in appearance, and everyone within 1d100 metres has a brief but horrific glimpse of the shadow of the Warp. Each character in the area (including the psyker) must make a Difficult (–10) Willpower test or gain 1d5 Corruption points.
effect: Difficult (–10) WP test or +1d5 Corruption within 1d100m.

title: Tech Scorn
description: The machine spirits reject these unnatural ways. All un-warded technology within 5d10 metres malfunctions momentarily, and all ranged weapons jam. Each character (including the psyker) within that range with cybernetic implants must pass an Ordinary (+10) Toughness test or suffer 1d5 Rending damage, ignoring Toughness bonus and Armour.
effect: Weapons jam within 5d10m. Cybernetics: Ordinary (+10) T test or 1d5 Rending (ignore AP+TB).

title: Warp Madness
description: A violent ripple of tainted discord causes all characters (except the psyker) within 2d10 metres to make a Difficult (–10) Willpower test; each character who fails gains 1d5 Corruption points and becomes Frenzied for 1 round.
effect: Difficult (–10) WP test or +1d5 Corruption and Frenzied 1 round within 2d10m.

title: Perils of the Warp!
description: The Warp opens in a wild maelstrom of unnatural energy. Roll on Table 6–3: Perils of the Warp.
effect: Roll on Perils of the Warp.
